sections: ### Q: 预算写的很隐蔽怎么办？
### Q: 评分标准复杂有多套规则怎么办？
1. 初审淘汰标准(必须符合才进入评审)
2. 详细评分标准(有权重和分值)
3. 最终得分计算(可能有加权公式)
### Q: 需求太多不知道优先级怎么办？
### Q: 招标文件有多份(资格预审、招标补充等)怎么办？
template.template_excerpt:
# 01_ANALYZE_BIDDING_DOCUMENT

## KEYWORDS
`analyze` `extract` `requirements` `scoring` `招标文件分析` `需求提取` `评分标准`

---

## TASK
Extract structured data from bidding document

## INPUT
- Bidding document (PDF/Word/Text)

## OUTPUT
```json
{
  "project": {name, type, budget, deadline, duration},
  "requirements": {functional, technical, commercial, delivery},
  "scoring": {total, categories, weights, formula},
  "mandatory": {qualifications, conditions, documents},
  "risk": {critical_items, disqualifications}
}
```

---

## WORKFLOW

| Step | Query | Tool | Output | Check |
|------|-------|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | 项目基本信息 | Scan headers | name, budget, deadline | ✓ Present |
| 2 | 需求 | Find sections | functional, technical, commercial | ✓ Complete |
| 3 | 评分 | Extract criteria section | total_points, categories | ✓ Hierarchy clear |
| 4 | 强制条件 | Search keywords | mandatory items, qualifications | ✓ Disqualifiers listed |
| 5 | 风险 | Identify abort conditions | immediate_fail_items | ✓ Critical noted |

---

## INFO_EXTRACTION_MATRIX

| Field | Keywords | Type | Priority |
|-------|----------|------|----------|
| PROJECT |  |  |  |
| └─ name | 项目、采购、招标 | text | 1️⃣ |
| └─ type | IT/
